name: Darboux Theorem
description: Local coordinates (p,q) with ω=Σ dpᵢ∧dqᵢ. Moser trick. No local invariants.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Darboux coords\nω = Σ dpᵢ∧dqᵢ"]
    D2["Def: Moser trick\nω_t interp, find φ"]
    D3["Def: Symplectic neighbor\nDarboux in nbhd"]
    T1["Thm: Darboux\nlocally ω standard"]
    T2["Thm: Moser\nω₀,ω₁ same vol⇒diffeo"]
    T3["Thm: Weinstein\nLagrangian nbhd"]
    T4["Thm: No local inv\nunlike Riemannian"]
    T5["Thm: Gromov non-squeeze\nball→cylinder"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D3 --> T1
    T1 --> T4
    T2 --> T3
    T4 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
